7498.one_line_summary: NFT redeemable campaigns with onchain/offchain redemptions and dynamic traits.
7498.notes: Extends ERC-721/1155 for redeemable entitlements. Integrates ERC-7496 dynamic traits. Uses EIP-712 signatures for optional redemption approval.

7506.one_line_summary: On-chain metadata registry for managing ecosystem claims with delegation and EIP-712 signatures.
7506.notes: Standardizes hint management for trustworthiness verification. Supports delegated access, EIP-712 meta-transactions. Optional ENS integration for discovery.

7507.one_line_summary: Multi-user NFT extension allowing multiple concurrent subscriptions with per-user expiration times.
7507.notes: Complements ERC-4907 (single rental) with support for concurrent users. Useful for IP licensing scenarios with time-limited subscriptions.

7508.one_line_summary: Public on-chain NFT attributes repository with access control and presigned updates.
7508.notes: Common-good repository for ERC-721/1155 attributes. Supports multiple attribute types, presigned modifications. Designed for cross-collection interactivity and perpetual on-chain storage.

7509.one_line_summary: Minimal Entity Component System for smart contracts enabling decoupled data and behavior.
7509.notes: Standardizes ECS pattern for smart contracts. World contracts manage entities, components, systems. Facilitates modular architecture and cross-contract applications.

7510.one_line_summary: Cross-contract hierarchical NFT relationships enabling multi-parent derivative tokens.
7510.notes: Extends ERC-721 with cross-contract parent tracking. Unlike ERC-6150 (same-contract), enables derivative NFTs in new collections from multiple parents.

7511.one_line_summary: Minimal proxy contract optimized with PUSH0 opcode reducing deployment and runtime gas.
7511.notes: Improves ERC-1167 with PUSH0; 200 gas deployment savings, 5 gas runtime per call. Requires Shanghai+ EVM. Same functionality as prior minimal proxy.

7512.one_line_summary: On-chain audit report representation with EIP-712 signatures and ERC compliance verification.
7512.notes: Standardizes audit metadata for on-chain verification. Tracks auditor, contract instance, ERC compliance. Supports SECP256K1, BLS, ERC1271, SECP256R1 signatures.

7513.one_line_summary: NFTs with embedded executable smart contract logic via intent-centric modules.
7513.notes: Fuses NFT with smart contract execution. Smart-Manager tracks verification status. Intent-Proxy enables batch NFT usage. Based on ERC-1155 for reusability.

7517.one_line_summary: AI/ML data mining preference metadata for digital assets respecting creator rights.
7517.notes: Extends ERC-721/7053 with dataMiningPreference field. Supports granular consent for data mining, AI training, inference. Aligns with C2PA standards.

7518.one_line_summary: Security token framework with partitions, dynamic compliance, and voucher-based transfer controls.
7518.notes: Extends ERC-1155 with partitions for granular compliance management. Includes token locking, forced transfers, address freezing, payouts. Supports interoperability via wrapping.

7521.one_line_summary: Generalized intent framework for smart wallets enabling future-proof flexible intent standards.
7521.notes: Entry-point contract for intent execution. Decouples verification from intent handling. MEV searchers (solvers) build IntentSolutions. Supports embedded standard optimizations.

7522.one_line_summary: ERC-4337 compatible OIDC ZK verifier enabling social login for smart accounts.
7522.notes: Links OIDC identity to ERC-4337 accounts via ZK proofs. Avoids MPC centralization. Supports aggregated proofs for multiple operations.

7524.one_line_summary: PLUME deterministic signature scheme producing verifiable nullifiers for anonymous uniqueness.
7524.notes: Verifiably deterministic ECDSA-based signatures enabling nullifiers without exporting private keys. Supports ZK voting, sybil resistance, pseudonymous airdrop uniqueness.

7527.one_line_summary: Wrap/unwrap ERC-20 or ETH to/from ERC-721 with embedded Function Oracle AMM pricing.
7527.notes: Agency/App architecture with FOAMM pricing. Supports custom wrap/unwrap fees. Enables liquidity via internal mint/burn rather than external LPs.
